title: Apollo Black Coffee Plunger / 350ml Jug - 2 Cup/Caffettiera French Filter Press/Tempered Glass
features: French press coffeemaker with the capacity of 350ML Jug - 2 Cups.
Made from High Quality shockproof tempered glass
Resistant to extremes of boiling and cold water.
Comes in a box, the Perfect gift for a Coffee Lover.
description: FOR ALL COFFEE LOVERS: This little brewer packs a big punch, making it the perfect choice for your morning cup of coffee. One of the best things about the Apollo Housewares coffee plunger is how easy it is to use. Simply add your coffee grounds and hot water, let it brew for a few minutes, and plunge away. It couldn't be simpler! But that's not all - this coffee plunger also has exceptional filtration, ensuring that your coffee is free from any unwanted bits and pieces. And when you're done brewing, cleanup is a breeze. Just give it a quick rinse and you're good to go. It's simply the best choice for coffee lovers who want convenience, quality, and style in one compact package. Don't miss out on the ultimate brewing experience - get yours today! Top-quality stainless steel
